creator: freebsd.68fba@nospam.spacesurfer.com
text:
(In reply to antonfb from comment #3)

My mistake, you are indeed correct. The only way to get IPv6 to work with java/openjdk22 is to set both -Djava.net.preferIPv4Stack=false and sysctl net.inet6.ip6.v6only=0

I was not aware of the net.inet6.ip6.v6only sysctl and miss-read your original comment.
